response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Mismatched lyrics in Reference JSON for Song 1 ('革命道中') were completely ignored, and Song 2 ('Catch the Moment') lyrics were verified against the audio. 2. JSON Usage: Conducted 100% manual transcription of Song 1 ('革命道中') to override the wrong reference lyrics, and utilized Song 2's lyrics as an auxiliary reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly synchronized each subtitle start and end time with the actual vocal waveforms to avoid cascading delays, creating a seamless and immersive viewing experience.

subtitles.original: 艶やかに 高鳴る心
subtitles.english: Elegantly, my throbbing heart...

subtitles.original: ダメダメ 待って待って
subtitles.english: No, no, wait, wait!

subtitles.original: 呪いも病も 抱きしめたい
subtitles.english: I want to embrace both the curse and the illness.

subtitles.original: ここらで暴れちゃってもいいかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if it's okay to wild out around here.

subtitles.original: あぁ 唸るぜ
subtitles.english: Ah, it's roaring!

subtitles.original: ちから ついたって 守りたい
subtitles.english: Even if I gain power, I want to protect you.

subtitles.original: 革命道中 だって君に夢中
subtitles.english: On the road of revolution, because I'm crazy about you.

subtitles.original: 暗闇 染み込む 世界で見つけた
subtitles.english: Found in a world where darkness seeps in...

subtitles.original: センチメンタルな恋
subtitles.english: A sentimental love.

subtitles.original: なりふり構わず 側にいたい
subtitles.english: Regardless of appearances, I want to be by your side.

subtitles.original: 不器用な君にも期待しちゃうよ
subtitles.english: I end up expecting things from clumsy you, too.

subtitles.original: しがみつけば 消えそうな灯に
subtitles.english: Clinging to the light that seems about to go out,

subtitles.original: 恋の爪立てて 近づいて
subtitles.english: I dig in love's claws and get closer.

subtitles.original: 身を任せるからさ 全て失ってもいい
subtitles.english: I'll surrender myself, so I don't mind losing everything.

subtitles.original: 艶やかに 高鳴る心
subtitles.english: Elegantly, my throbbing heart...

subtitles.original: ダメダメ 待って待って
subtitles.english: No, no, wait, wait!

subtitles.original: 呪いも病も 君となら
subtitles.english: Curses and illness, if it's with you...

subtitles.original: ここらで暴れちゃってもいいかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if it's okay to wild out around here.

subtitles.original: あぁ 泣けるぜ
subtitles.english: Ah, it makes me cry!

subtitles.original: 絶句しちゃうまで 離れない
subtitles.english: Until I'm left speechless, I won't let go.

subtitles.original: 革命道中 だって君に夢中
subtitles.english: On the road of revolution, because I'm crazy about you.

subtitles.original: 旅の狭間で 見つけた
subtitles.english: Found in the midst of the journey...

subtitles.original: センチメンタルな恋
subtitles.english: A sentimental love.

subtitles.original: 突き進むなら二人で
subtitles.english: If we are to push forward, let it be the two of us.

subtitles.original: 革命道中 だって夢に熱中
subtitles.english: On the road of revolution, because I'm obsessed with my dream.

subtitles.original: ダメダメ 待って待って
subtitles.english: No, no, wait, wait!

subtitles.original: 呪いも病も 抱きしめたい
subtitles.english: I want to embrace both the curse and the illness.

subtitles.original: ここらで暴れちゃってもいいよね
subtitles.english: Is it okay if I wild out around here?

subtitles.original: 怖くたって 唸るぜ
subtitles.english: Even if I'm scared, it roars!

subtitles.original: ちから ついたって 守りたい
subtitles.english: Even if I gain power, I want to protect you.

subtitles.original: 革命道中 だって君に夢中
subtitles.english: On the road of revolution, because I'm crazy about you.

subtitles.original: 暗闇 染み込む 世界で見つけた
subtitles.english: Found in a world where darkness seeps in...

subtitles.original: センチメンタルな恋
subtitles.english: A sentimental love.

subtitles.original: いくぞー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: はい！はい！はい！はい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: そっと吐き出すため息を吸い込んだ
subtitles.english: I quietly inhaled the sigh I breathed out.

subtitles.original: 後悔は苦い味残して
subtitles.english: Regret left behind a bitter taste.

subtitles.original: いつもなんで？ 肝心なこと言えないまま
subtitles.english: Always, why? Unable to say what's essential,

subtitles.original: 次の朝日が顔出してる
subtitles.english: the next morning sun is showing its face.

subtitles.original: 嫌になった運命をナイフで切り刻んで
subtitles.english: I carved up the fate I grew sick of with a knife.

subtitles.original: もう一度やり直したら
subtitles.english: If I redo it once more,

subtitles.original: キミに出会えないかも
subtitles.english: maybe I won't meet you.

subtitles.original: 僕の声が響いた瞬間に始まる
subtitles.english: At the moment my voice echoed, it begins.

subtitles.original: 命のリミット 心臓がカウントしてる
subtitles.english: The limit of life, my heart is counting.

subtitles.original: 叶えても 叶えても終わらない願い
subtitles.english: Even if I fulfill it, even if I fulfill it, the wish won't end.

subtitles.original: 汗をかいて走った世界の秒針は
subtitles.english: The second hand of the world I ran while sweating through

subtitles.original: いつか止まった僕を置いていく
subtitles.english: will someday stop and leave me behind.

subtitles.original: あと何回キミと笑えるの？
subtitles.english: How many more times can I laugh with you?

subtitles.original: 試してるんだ僕を Catch the Moment
subtitles.english: I am testing myself, Catch the Moment.

subtitles.original: 一個幸せを数えるたびに
subtitles.english: Every time I count one happiness,

subtitles.original: 変わっていく未来に怯えてしまうけど
subtitles.english: I fear the future that keeps changing, but

subtitles.original: 愛情の種を大切に育てよう
subtitles.english: let's cherish and nurture the seeds of affection.

subtitles.original: 分厚い雲もやがて突き破るかな
subtitles.english: Maybe it will pierce through the thick clouds someday.

subtitles.original: キミの声が響いた僕の全身を通って
subtitles.english: Your voice echoed through my whole body,

subtitles.original: 心臓のドアをノックしてる
subtitles.english: knocking on the door of my heart.

subtitles.original: 「臆病」でも開けちゃうんだよ信じたいから
subtitles.english: Even if I am a "coward", I'll open it because I want to believe.

subtitles.original: 何にもないと思ったはずの足元に
subtitles.english: Under my feet where I thought there was nothing at all,

subtitles.original: 何にもないと思った
subtitles.english: I thought there was nothing...

subtitles.original: はずの足元に
subtitles.english: under my feet.
